title: January 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 18''' is the 18th day of the year. 347 days (348 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Jamie Alcroft]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Hossein Amini]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Daniel José Older]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 70|''Star Wars'' (1977) 70]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 31|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 31]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Ancuta Breaban]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 135|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 135]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Ingvild Deila]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Graeme Campbell]] dies.
*[[1994]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] published.
*[[1997]] – With [[George Lucas]], [[Mark Hamill]], and [[Carrie Fisher]] in attendance, the [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|''Special Edition'']] of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] makes its world premiere in Los Angeles.
*1997 – [[20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox's]] copyright on ''A New Hope'' is transferred to [[Lucasfilm]].
*[[2002]] – [[Roy Conrad]] dies.
*[[2015]] – [[Keith Swaden]] dies.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 3|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 3]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 27|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 26]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Sutā Wōzu/Fōsu No Kakusei Konpurīto Gaido]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Luke Skywalker vs. Darth Vader – Join Me]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[The Book of Boba Fett Poster Book]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Faster]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Bounty Hunters 30|''Bounty Hunters'' 30]] published.
*2023 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 9|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 9]] published.
<noinclude>
